overall_project_analysis.verdict: Full orchestrator team initialized to decompose the request.

task_pipeline.description: Initialize project repository with multi‑file microservice architecture, create Dockerfiles for each service, set up Kubernetes manifests, and scaffold CI/CD pipeline configuration.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a solid mid‑level developer. Generate the repository layout, Dockerfiles, Kubernetes manifests, and CI/CD pipeline skeleton. Provide the code/files directly and include brief integration notes.

task_pipeline.description: Design and document the overall system architecture, including service boundaries, communication patterns, service mesh selection, and high‑availability strategies.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Provide concise architecture diagrams and a markdown document describing service boundaries, communication, service mesh choice, and HA strategies. No extra commentary.

task_pipeline.description: Implement authentication and authorization service with secure token generation, password hashing, role‑based access control, and integration with all microservices.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Act as a principal systems architect. Deliver a production‑grade auth service with JWT token handling, bcrypt password hashing, RBAC, and secure integration hooks for every microservice. Include security best‑practice rationale and sample usage.

task_pipeline.description: Develop REST API service with CRUD endpoints, input validation, error handling, and integrate with ORM for database operations.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Write robust, modular REST controller code with full CRUD, validation, error handling, and ORM integration. Explain how to wire it into the service and expose it.

task_pipeline.description: Create GraphQL API layer with schema definitions, resolvers, and federation to work alongside REST services.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Provide GraphQL schema files and resolver stubs that can be dropped into the project. Keep output minimal.

task_pipeline.description: Set up ORM models for multi‑tenant database schema, write migration scripts, and configure connection pooling.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Generate ORM model definitions, migration files, and a connection‑pool config snippet. No extra explanation.

task_pipeline.description: Integrate Redis caching layer with read‑through and write‑through strategies, and add cache invalidation logic.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Provide Redis client setup code, caching wrappers, and invalidation functions ready for inclusion.

task_pipeline.description: Implement event‑driven message queue system (e.g., Kafka) with producer and consumer services for real‑time concurrent processing.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Create producer and consumer modules, configure Kafka topics, and show how services publish/subscribe. Include brief integration steps.

task_pipeline.description: Configure Kubernetes deployments with Helm charts, set up load balancers, horizontal pod autoscaling, health probes, and enable zero‑downtime rolling updates.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Output Helm chart templates and Kubernetes YAML for deployments, services, HPA, and rolling update strategy.

task_pipeline.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions to build Docker images, run tests, and deploy to Kubernetes with canary releases.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Provide a GitHub Actions workflow file covering build, test, Docker push, and canary deployment steps.

task_pipeline.description: Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack, with dashboards for each microservice.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Supply Prometheus scrape configs, Grafana dashboard JSON snippets, and ELK pipeline config files.

task_pipeline.description: Design disaster recovery strategy with automated backups, multi‑region failover, and data replication to ensure zero‑downtime recovery.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Create a markdown DR plan outlining backup schedules, failover procedures, and replication setup.

task_pipeline.description: Write comprehensive documentation, API specs, architecture diagrams, and onboarding guides.
task_pipeline.system_instructions: Produce markdown files for project README, API specification (OpenAPI), architecture overview, and developer onboarding steps.
